overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Death Stranding showing a lone character with a large illuminated backpack traversing a rocky mountain ridge at night. The scene features a dark blue starry sky, glowing chiral particles scattered across the terrain, and dramatic rock formations silhouetted against the night.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky mountain ridge with scattered luminous particles

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across uneven rocky terrain carrying a large backpack with blue illuminated accents

entered.detail: steep dark rock face rising beside the path
dark mountain range visible on the horizon against the night sky
small blue-white luminous specks scattered across the ground surface
dark blue sky filled with visible stars and faint clouds

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a rocky mountain ridge at night, with a steep cliff face on the left and open sky above. The terrain is scattered with glowing blue particles, and distant mountains are silhouetted against the starry sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky mountain ridge with tall spire formations

events.description: tall jagged rock spires come into prominent view on the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk forward as the terrain opens up to reveal dramatic rock formations ahead

entered.detail: jagged vertical rock pinnacles rising prominently from the terrain

segments.scene_description: As the character moves past the left cliff, tall dramatic rock spires emerge on the right side of the frame. The path continues through the open mountain terrain with glowing particles still visible on the ground.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a rocky mountain ridge at night that shifts from a narrow cliffside path to an open vista of dramatic spires. It begins with the character walking beside a steep cliff face on the left, moving through terrain scattered with glowing blue particles under a starry sky. As the character progresses past the cliff, the perspective opens up to reveal tall, dramatic rock spires emerging on the right side of the frame. The scene then expands across the open mountain terrain, maintaining the glow of the particles on the ground before continuing toward the silhouetted peaks in the distance.
